coordinate_system.origin: top-left for this specification; convert to Unity anchors as documented per module

pixel_grid.runtime_scaling_rule: CanvasScaler may scale the complete canvas; never apply non-uniform scale to an individual sprite. Sliced sprites stretch only their edge/center bands at 1:1 pixel density.
pixel_grid.art_rule: Draw ornaments and icons on a 2 px detail module where practical; retain 1 px highlights only for legibility.

v3_contract_rules.nine_slice_first: Sliced panels ship as small sliceable bitmaps; on-screen size lives in the RectTransform (display_size_px), not the bitmap (source_size_px).
v3_contract_rules.generation_size_grid: Every Simple-sprite display size times an integer factor (2 or 4) must land on a PixelLab generation tier; downscale is nearest-neighbor by that exact factor only.
v3_contract_rules.style_chain: Panels, slots, and label come from one pieces-templated hero sheet (fixed seed and palette); small objects use style_images cropped from the approved sheet.
v3_contract_rules.no_stretch: Assets that fail the integer factor check are re-rolled, never stretched non-uniformly.

generation_prompt_defaults.style: crisp 2D pixel-art fantasy HUD, dark navy charcoal panels, polished muted silver frames, restrained warm gold accents, nearest-neighbor edges
constraints: no text unless the asset explicitly requests text

hero_sheet.color_palette: dark navy panel, polished silver frame, gold corner accents
hero_sheet.pieces_note: Virtual editor canvas is 512x512 for a square output; piece coordinates below are assumed top-left based and verified against the returned image before cropping.

pieces.label: main HUD panel frame, dark navy fill, silver edge, gold corner ornaments
square inventory slot, dark well, chunky silver corners
selected inventory slot, hard gold inner border, gold corner markers, no glow
plain low-contrast label backing, one-pixel silver edge, no ornaments

portrait_frame.note: reuses the slot_normal crop; the portrait frame is the same 48x48 sliced frame

object_jobs.derivations: half and empty states derived deterministically from the promoted full-heart master (v2 method)

operational_lessons: 64-candidate packs (size <= 42) timed out server-side twice on 2026-07-12; prefer 43-85 px packs (16 candidates), which completed reliably.

style_images cannot be combined with an explicit size: the largest style image dictates the output size, so candidate-grid jobs run without style refs and carry palette hints in the description instead.
pixellab_generation_v3_plan.budget_note: Roughly 2 UI-asset calls plus 5-6 object jobs plus a 50% re-roll reserve; subscription had 1640 generations remaining on 2026-07-12.

v1_component_sheet.name: ProjectTwelve HUD Component Sheet v1
rejection_reasons: generated a complete fantasy menu instead of isolated HUD components
included baked LOAD GAME, OPTIONS, and EXIT text despite the no-text constraint
included character and environment art outside the HUD asset scope
did not provide the required heart states, slot frames, label backing, or debug backing
cannot be cropped into the exact per-asset dimensions without inventing missing content

portrait_frame.reason: generated a multi-component UI kit instead of one portrait frame (root cause: create_ui_asset cannot target small exact sizes; below-192 requests scaffold component kits)

selected_item_label.reason: generated an unintended checker texture instead of a plain label backing

integration_notes: v2 production art remains wired until v3 assets are approved and normalized
portrait disconnected artifacts removed by deterministic connected-component cleanup
empty and half hearts deterministically derived from the accepted full-heart source so all three states share one silhouette, outline, and pixel grid
frame widths normalized with horizontal 9-slice-safe center scaling

prompt.primary_request: A square sliceable fantasy panel frame with a dark navy filled center, crisp silver metal edges, and small warm-gold corner ornaments fully contained in the 16x16 corner regions.
constraints: all four 16x16 corner regions self-contained and symmetrical
horizontal and vertical stretch bands free of ornaments

prompt.primary_request: Reuse the slot_normal crop from the hero sheet: a square dark frame with chunky silver corners; transparent or dark center well for the portrait.
constraints: identical style family to the hotbar slots

prompt.primary_request: Front-facing tiny sandbox adventurer portrait, brown hair, blue tunic, warm skin, readable at 40 pixels.
Empty 16x16 heart sharing the full-heart master's exact alpha silhouette, with a dark-red cavity fill.
constraints: same source, silhouette, perimeter, and pixel grid as full and half hearts

prompt.primary_request: Half-filled 16x16 heart from the full-heart master; bright left fill, empty-state fill on the right of a crisp vertical split.
constraints: same source, silhouette, perimeter, and pixel grid as full and empty hearts

prompt.primary_request: A full 16x16 bright red pixel heart with a dark outline and a single crisp highlight cluster.
constraints: same silhouette as half and empty hearts

prompt.primary_request: Retained accepted v2 asset: compact low-contrast charcoal hotbar backing; Unity slicing narrows the center band to the 560px v3 display width.
A square dark inventory slot with chunky silver corners, restrained gold fasteners, and a clean 32x32 icon well.
A selected-slot overlay matching the normal slot with a bright warm-gold 2-pixel inner border and four crisp corner markers.
constraints: readable over bright and dark terrain

prompt.primary_request: A subtle semi-transparent dark navy pixel label backing with a one-pixel silver-dark outline, from the hero sheet label bar.
constraints: high contrast on sky, grass, snow, and dirt

prompt.primary_request: Unchanged accepted v2 asset: plain semi-transparent charcoal debug telemetry backing with a one-pixel muted border.
A 32x32 pixel-art dirt block icon, warm brown soil with sparse darker pebbles.
A 32x32 grass-over-dirt block icon matching the world terrain, bright green top fringe and warm brown soil.
A 32x32 cool gray stone block icon with chunky irregular facets and small highlights.
A 32x32 gray masonry block icon with a readable staggered brick pattern.
constraints: brick pattern remains visible at HUD size

prompt.primary_request: A crisp 16x16 pixel cursor arrow in silver-white with a charcoal shadow pixel edge and one gold accent pixel.
